scope: Local S2PMT04 B-005 remediation evidence for low-disk cache degradation, blocking new downloads and rebuildable cache writes while preserving durable evidence and keeping cleanup dry-run.
non_scope: No scheduler install or enablement, real SMTP send, Release, production restore, DB migration, public schema change, production queue mutation, ranking, source adapter change, live source fetch, V7.1/V7.2 contract edit, P0/P1 closure claim, DAILY_OPERATION, or integrated production acceptance.
local_gates: Low disk pressure is computed from free_disk_bytes below threshold
Low disk pressure enters low_disk_degraded mode
New downloads are blocked under low disk pressure
Rebuildable cache writes are blocked under low disk pressure
Cleanup remains dry-run and does not apply deletes or mutate queues
validation: source/board user-center root gate regression: 14 OK
non-blocking full semantic extractor terminated after more than 90 seconds; not claimed as passed
